description: Produces a transaction of the last discussed user story from the given content, adhering to provided instructions and examples if provided.

input_variables.name: content
input_variables.description: The content to extract the last story from

input_variables.name: lengthInSentences
input_variables.description: The desired number of sentences for the summary

input_variables.name: instructions
input_variables.description: Additional instructions on how to approach the extraction of the last story
input_variables.default: Provide a transaction of the last user story discussed in the transcription. Focus on roles (ex: a client) rather than specific people (Mr Smith).

input_variables.name: examples
input_variables.description: Examples of summaries to guide the output style and tone
